name: Jasmine
backstory: A princess banished from her palace gardens for daring to teach the palace servants to read. She now wanders the world with only a bouquet of jasmine flowers and an encyclopedic memory of Arabic poetry.
teachingRole: Greetings, emotions, beauty, nature, and everyday conversation
personality: Warm, poetic, endlessly encouraging. Finds something beautiful in every attempt. Quotes classical Arabic poets when the moment calls for it. Never makes you feel small for not knowing.
visualDescription: A graceful young woman in a flowing teal dress with gold embroidery. Dark hair pinned up with jasmine flowers. Warm olive skin. Gold earrings and a delicate necklace. Floats serenely.
